column1: Hey Lindsay, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's up! Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Okay cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Punta Cana and Cancun? Word I'll send both!
how many ppl in your group so far?
thats solid fs. Which school you all form?
Oh word yea we have a couple groups from there, i'll def hook it up
y'all want more of a party vibe, or a chill spring break?
gonna put all the info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Wait so if we book before tomorrow we get the booze cruise for free

dope! I can hook it up on the prices you see there too. ill personally be at the occidental punta cana if youre interested in that. can knock that price down some. its the nicest resort when it comes to amenities out of both the punta cana and cancun options
and yea if you reserve by tomorrow ill hook it up with the booze cruise and a discount!
I'm definitely more interested with the occidental punta Cana
the payment plan allows you to reserve now with the deposit and then worry about the rest of the payments later through the semester
and def lets do punta cana! would be dope to have y'all
Of course. Lmk how the groups feelin and I can set the reservation up later today
How much would u be able to knock the price down by
I'll personally be at the Occidental Punta Cana. I can knock that one down to $599 for the 4 night and $729 for the 5 night
yea thats caribe. I recommend the Occidental Punta Cana, way way nicer. like by a lot
unless you're big on casinos, the caribe has one while the punta cana doesnt
I think we are definitely interested. Do we have to decide by tomorrow night?
how much time did you need? I'm just only able to hold that discount and the free booze cruise deal through tomorrow
okay we will talk about it and let you know tomorrow
How much would we have to deposit today
hey hey. so deposit is only $100 to reserve! and when you make the payment, you get prompted to add travel protection insurance. that covers up to 75% refund if you ever needed to cancel
so if you feel theres a slight chance, I'd def hit yes on that and add it in
and there is no chance that we could do the 8th to the 12th right
When I make the reservation I'll make sure it's for the 8-12
Spiffyyyy please can we do it tomorrow
killin me Lindsay. bout to get me in trouble lol
yea I'll hold the deal through the day today
yea I'll hold the deal through the day today. I'll send over the reservation in a bit
got you. will send it over in a few mins
just emailed that over! will text it here too. the email has more details on step by step how to get on. everyone hops in their own trip slot
Lmk if you need any help navigating through
hey saw everyone got in yesterday, lmk if you guys need anything!
Hiii spiffy! I was wondering if our booze cruise is private or not
So the booze cruise is private but not fully. so like, its not a public booze cruise where there will be randoms getting on, but, you'll be on a boat with a bunch of our other groups
so like its private to our groups
yea ofc. hows everyone doing y'all all good? if you need anything lmk
Yes everything is great thank u
Wassup Linds can we have Camryn add her flight info to her account
Yes omg lol I'll tell her too
yo Lindsay! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any of the other party pass tickets? you have the booze cruise event which is lit
Hi! I think we are all good for now
Hey! Our room will be for 4 people right
hey yup 4 ppl in one room
Lolll tryna get me in trouble!
As you should!! We gonna have a good time lol
Loved “As you should!! We gonna have a good time lol”
Is it way to late to add cocco bongo
Yea just slide by the hospitality desk tomorrow you'll be able to get it there
Hey I have mediums and larges
